zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Susanna Clarke於1242年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Thomas M Clarke22歲，母親Lady Angharad de Malpas17歲。她於大約1262年與Sir Simon de Woodchurch在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1280年在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Susanna Clarke于1242年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Thomas M Clarke22岁，母亲Lady Angharad de Malpas17岁。她于大约1262年与Sir Simon de Woodchurch在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1280年在英国英格兰肯特阿福德享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Susanna Clarke was born in 1242, in Kent, England, her father, Thomas M Clarke, was 22 and her mother, Lady Angharad de Malpas, was 17. She married Sir Simon de Woodchurch about 1262, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1280, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Susanna Clarke est née en 1242, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas M Clarke, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Angharad de Malpas, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Simon de Woodchurch environ 1262, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Susanna Clarke 1242 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas M Clarke 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Angharad de Malpas 17. Sie hat um 1262 in England Sir Simon de Woodchurch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Susanna Clarke(이)가 1242년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas M Clarke(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Angharad de Malpas(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1262년 영국에서 Sir Simon de Woodchurch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Susanna Clarke nasceu em 1242, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas M Clarke, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Angharad de Malpas, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Simon de Woodchurch aproximadamente 1262, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.All Saints Churchyard, Woodchurch, Ashfo: алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Susanna Clarke родилась в 1242 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas M Clarke было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Angharad de Malpas, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Simon de Woodchurch около 1262 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
